title: melicope grisea var. crassifolia
intro: Melicope grisea var. crassifolia, also known as the Rough-leaved Melicope, is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Melicope grisea var. crassifolia include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
